title: $NO_UNIFIELDS
text: $NO_UNIFIELDS Replace all unifields with edit boxes. $NO_UNIFIELDS Defaults Assignment file: Any application assignment file Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: None Description $NO_UNIFIELDS replaces all Unifields with edit boxes and should be present when using languages where characters are primarily read right to left, such as Hebrew or Arabic. If you want to use language-specific entries in ProcScript, you must use this assignment setting. Related Links $RTL_APPLICATION Specify that the desktop application will read from right to left instead of from left to right. This causes the layout of all forms and their contents to be mirrored, so that the starting point for reading is the right side. $RTL_FIELDS Set the position of the cursor in the field at deployment. For right-to-left applications only. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
